30.2.7 - Frequency of Review of the Plan of Care 
(Rev. 10438, Issued: 11-06-20, Effective: 03-01-20, Implementation: 01- 11-21) 

The plan of care must be reviewed and signed by the physician or allowed practitioner 
who established the plan of care, in consultation with HHA professional
